task: Parse an AWS CloudFormation template and extract all resource logical IDs that are of type 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
solution_criteria: Function should correctly identify and return all S3 bucket resource IDs from a CloudFormation JSON template. Should handle nested structures and return results as a list.

task: Create a JSON configuration object for an AWS Lambda function that includes environment variables, timeout settings, and memory allocation
solution_criteria: JSON object should be valid, include required Lambda configuration keys (FunctionName, Runtime, Handler, Timeout, MemorySize, Environment), and follow AWS Lambda configuration standards.

task: Write a regex pattern to validate AWS IAM role ARNs in the format 'arn:aws:iam::account-id:role/role-name'
solution_criteria: Regex should match valid IAM role ARNs, correctly validate account IDs (12 digits), and role names (alphanumeric with hyphens/underscores). Should reject malformed ARNs.
